rows.label: qev031102_MSG0001
rows.name: Hmm, is this an Earth plant as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Quite fascinating... Would it be alright
if I cut down just one to take home with
me? I wish to utilize it for my research.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev031102_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask if he is a botanist.

rows.label: qev031102_JNK0020
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Reprimand him by stating
that it is public property.

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0003
rows.name:
Yes, it is true that my profession
is analyzing plant components
and proliferating them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0004
rows.name: And who might you be...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0005
rows.name:
...You are searching for a way to
grow a tree brought over by a Bias?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0006
rows.name:
Let me see... If it is a normal tree, it can be made to grow
as long as you have Deformed Tree Nectar, found at the Divine
Roost at the northernmost tip of Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hmm... I would very much like to see this
Great Tree for myself at least once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0008
rows.name:
Very well, my Ovah has begun to ache as
well. I shall go and meet this Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0009
rows.name:
You treat something like this as
public property? Earthlings truly
are strange creatures, as expected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Well, understood. As long as
we live in this NLA, we must
abide by your rules, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0011
rows.name:
If it is a seed of this type, using Deformed Tree Nectar
found at the Divine Roost at the northernmost tip of
Nightglow Forest will allow it to grow large immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Hmm, I am looking forward
to it. It seems it will become
a tree quite to my liking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0013
rows.name:
Now, please deliver that Deformed
Tree Nectar to Naza-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0014
rows.name:
Let us see what kind of tree
this Great Tree will grow into.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0015
rows.name:
I ended up eating something that held
the same value as an Ovah to her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0016
rows.name:
I truly have done something unthinkable.
Please bring the two materials. I
swear... I will regenerate it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0017
rows.name:
How did it go? Did you acquire
the materials necessary to
reconstruct the Great Tree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0018
rows.name:
Hmm... These are exactly as
specified. Well then, let us
regenerate the tree immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Naza-san. To ensure accuracy, I would
like you to teach me various things about
the Great Tree, if you wouldn't mind?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0020
rows.name:
I don't mind, but... If the tree doesn't
go back to normal, you'll pay for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0021
rows.name:
Please rest easy. By combining the information
I gained from eating it with your knowledge,
the tree will definitely be resurrected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0022
rows.name:
Now then, please let me hear
the story. The history of the
sacred trees of the Bias...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0023
rows.name: ...It really... went back to normal...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0024
rows.name:
The Great Tree you spoke of... I believe
I have achieved a perfect reconstruction
worthy of its heavy history.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0025
rows.name:
Hmm... Indeed, looking at it like
this, it does seem as if some
sacred being resides within it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0026
rows.name:
This guy, he's a weirdo, but... He
really isn't a bad guy. How should I
say it... You really just never know...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0027
rows.name:
I wonder if talking things out like this
can lead to mutual understanding with
any alien? ...Hey, what do you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031102_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod and agree with her.

rows.label: qev031102_JNK0040
rows.name: Caution

rows.label: qev031102_SEL0041
rows.name:
Tell her that total mutual
understanding is impossible.

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0028
rows.name:
The reason Earthlings can get along with
folks from all sorts of planets is probably
because there are people like you around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0029
rows.name:
I also need to follow your example
and do something about my habit
of lashing out immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0030
rows.name: Yeah... What you say makes sense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0031
rows.name:
We've been fighting with the
Cavern Clan for ten thousand
years, even though we're both Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0032
rows.name:
But, you know, I feel like I could
join hands with the Orpheans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0033
rows.name:
...Yeah, this makes us even for you
eating it! Thanks for teaching me how
to make the Great Tree grow big![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0034
rows.name: Wha...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0035
rows.name:
You are... Yun'otonam!
Why are you here...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0036
rows.name:
Following the guidance of my Ovah... I
sensed that you were creating a delicious-looking
tree, so I came to partake of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0037
rows.name:
Wh... Wh-Wh-Wh-Whaaaat!! You!
This is my Great Tree...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Hm? Was the original
version of this tree yours?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0039
rows.name:
The tree of the Bias was a flavor quite
to my liking. Please, let me partake
of it again sometime, won't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0040
rows.name: Guh! Gwaaaargh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0041
rows.name: ...You, this is your reward. Take it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0042
rows.name:
...I'll try talking with this guy
too, until we can reach that...
mutual understanding thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0043
rows.name:
Hah! Thoroughly, by any
means necessary... right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0044
rows.name:
There is no need to thank me. If you
require another copy of the Great Tree,
please request one at any time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Thank you too. If it weren't
for you, I feel like things would
have been a complete disaster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031102_MSG0046
rows.name: Take this. It's a token of my gratitude.[ST:wait ]
